aliases: Ayushman Bharat Mukh Mantri Sehat Yojana

income_thresholds.description: UNIVERSAL — NO income criteria. ALL Punjab residents are eligible regardless of income. This is the most inclusive state health scheme in India.

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Punjab are eligible; must hold valid Punjab domicile or ration card
Families without Aadhaar or Punjab ration card may face delays; alternative identity proof accepted

family_criteria.family_definition: All Punjab residents are covered with NO restriction on family size, NO age restriction, and NO income criteria. Coverage is the highest in India at Rs 10 lakh per family per year. Pre-existing conditions covered with no waiting period.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker implant)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery, fracture fixation)
Oncology (chemotherapy, radiation therapy, surgical oncology, bone marrow transplant)
Neurosurgery (brain tumor surgery, craniotomy, spinal cord procedures)
Pre-existing conditions covered from day 1 (no waiting period)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Ration Card (Punjab) / Smart Ration Card
required_documents.notes: Any valid proof of Punjab residency accepted. Unlike most schemes, no specific ration card type required since scheme is UNIVERSAL.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP-based Aadhaar verification and scheme notifications

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Ayushman/MMSY card generation

required_documents.name: Punjab Residency Proof
required_documents.notes: Any government-issued document confirming Punjab residency is sufficient

enrollment_channels: Ayushman Bharat portal linked to MMSY
enrollment_steps: Step 1: ALL Punjab residents are eligible — check enrollment status on sha.punjab.gov.in or call SHA helpline
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC (Sewa Kendra) or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar and any Punjab residency proof
Step 3: Complete Aadhaar-based e-KYC (biometric or OTP verification)
Step 4: Operator verifies Punjab residency from provided documents
Step 5: MMSY/Ayushman card generated with family member details; valid immediately
Step 6: For treatment, visit any MMSY-empanelled hospital in Punjab or designated out-of-state hospitals
Step 7: Cashless treatment up to Rs 10 lakh per family per year; pre-existing conditions covered from day 1
description_for_embedding: Mukh Mantri Sehat Yojana (MMSY) is Punjab's UNIVERSAL health insurance scheme providing Rs 10 lakh (Rs 1000000) per family per year — the HIGHEST coverage amount among all state health schemes in India. It covers ALL Punjab residents with NO income criteria, NO age restriction, and NO occupation restriction. The scheme covers 1579 treatment packages across all medical specialties at empanelled hospitals. Pre-existing conditions are covered from day 1 with no waiting period. The scheme integrates with Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY at the central level. Completely free with no premium for any resident. Punjab is the only state offering truly universal Rs 10 lakh coverage to every resident. Portal: sha.punjab.gov.in.
